name: RhinoHelp
summary: Provides access to the built in Rhino help system

methods.name: Show
methods.summary: Call this method to display standard Rhino help

params.name: helpLink
params.doc: Rhino help links are formatted like this: http://docs.mcneel.com/rhino/6/help/en-us/index.htm#commands/line.htm This parameter would be equal to "#commands/line.htm" in the link above. Rhino will calculate the string up to and including the index.html and append this value to the end.
